title: France, Britain and Other Countries Say They’ll Send Ships to the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: For months, a coalition led by Britain and France has been preparing to send minesweepers and other ships to secure the strait once the fighting ends. That moment may finally be here.
summary_public: For months, a coalition led by Britain and France has been preparing to send minesweepers and other ships to secure the strait once the fighting ends. That moment may finally be here.
